# JeffSu Study Guide & Quiz Summary

## Study Guide Structure (Generated by NotebookLM)
The comprehensive study guide covers 4 main sections:

### I. Key Concepts and Themes
1. **Digital Tool Optimization** — Mac OS, Google Workspace, Canva
2. **Capture and Organize Philosophy** — Todoist widget, transition periods
3. **Professional Communication** — Project recaps (TLDR + quantifiable results)
4. **Advanced AI Integration** — Flash vs Reasoning models, AI Agents, Prompt Engineering

### II. Short-Answer Practice Questions (6 questions)
Covers Anti-McDonald's Habit, Present-Past-Future framework, YouTube shortcuts, Gemini Canvas, AI agent components, Inbox Zero 2-minute rule, MonitorControl.

### III. Essay Prompts for Deeper Exploration (4 prompts)
1. Contractor-to-FTE pipeline ethics and strategy
2. Shift from passive LLMs to autonomous AI agents
3. Google Baby phenomenon and career resilience
4. Information architecture in personal productivity

### IV. Glossary of Important Terms
S.T.A.R., C.A.R.L., S.C.Q.A., R.A.G., Inbox Zero, G.C.A., Multimodality, Snippet, Self-Referential Filter, ISO Format
